allow: PowerShell($npm = Get-Command npm.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($npm\) { $npm.Source } else { "not found"; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build --prefix client 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
